case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF VS. MELISSA DORIS BRACERO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-11-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRACERO, MELISSA DORIS $1,378.70 PRINCIPAL, $50.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,429.20 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,378.70 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT BRACERO, MELISSA DORIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
